headline: Assessing Welltower (WELL) Valuation After Seniors Housing Portfolio Recycling And Acquisition Activity
summary: Recent attention on Welltower (WELL) has centered on how capital recycling and seniors housing acquisitions are reshaping its portfolio. Improved operator diversification and solid liquidity are helping support investor interest in the healthcare real estate name. See our latest analysis for Welltower. At a latest share price of US$204.70, Welltower’s 1 day and 7 day share price returns of 1.55% and 2.94% sit against a softer 30 day move, while a 9.50% year to date share price return and very...
